hero.title: Team
hero.description: Meet the people behind the club's algorithm work, engineering support, and shared team structure for reproducible benchmarking.

sections.title: Two-Track Structure
sections.intro: The club uses two tracks to keep technical ownership clear while connecting shared benchmark work.

cards.title: Infrastructure
cards.description: Infrastructure keeps the club's engineering workflows stable, reviewable, and reusable.

cards.title: Algorithm
cards.description: Algorithm develops the quantitative methods and comparison logic the club evaluates.

sections.title: How to Get Involved
sections.intro: Use this section as a starting point for joining the club's algorithm, infrastructure, and benchmark-support work.

groups.title: Join Us
groups.description: The club welcomes students who want to contribute to algorithm-oriented technical work, reproducible benchmarking, and long-term project building.

groups.title: Current Open Roles
bullets: Algorithm Track Contributor: help implement and compare quantitative methods under shared evaluation rules.
Infrastructure Track Contributor: support tooling, environments, and benchmark workflow reliability.
Documentation and Release Support: organize notes, summaries, and linked artifacts for review.

groups.title: How to Start
bullets: Read the Team, Plan, and Release pages.
Choose a topic area or track that matches your interests.
Start with implementation, documentation, review, or experiment-support tasks.
Grow into deeper technical ownership over time.
